---
title: "Imad Dabbura"
pagetitle: "Imad Dabbura"
subtitle: "AI Scientist"
description: "Understanding AI by building it from scratch — long-form posts, paper summaries, and open-source projects from first principles."
image: images/landing-page-img-web.jpg
page-layout: full
comments: false
about:
  template: solana
  image-width: 28em
  id: hero-heading
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      aria-label: "Twitter"
      href: https://twitter.com/imadphd
    - icon: linkedin
      aria-label: "LinkedIn"
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/imaddabbura/
    - icon: github
      aria-label: "GitHub"
      href: https://github.com/imaddabbura
    - icon: medium
      aria-label: "Medium"
      href: https://medium.com/@ImadPhd
    - icon: envelope
      aria-label: "Email"
      href: mailto:imad.dabbura@hotmail.com

header-includes: >
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/index.css">
resources:
  - assets/index.css
listing:
  - id: start-here
    contents:
      - posts/mlsys/improving-mlsys-theory-of-constraint.qmd
      - product-management/shipping-software-projects.qmd
      - posts/nlp/Transformer-Architecture-Explained.ipynb
      - posts/nlp/LSTM-Annotated-Implementation.ipynb
      - posts/nlp/GPT2-From-Scratch.ipynb
      - posts/mlsys/dl-systems.qmd
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [image, title, categories]
  - id: latest-writing
    contents: posts
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    max-items: 3
    fields: [date, title, subtitle, categories, reading-time]
---

<br><br>

::: {#hero-heading}

[Learn more about me &rarr;](about.qmd){.about-links .subtitle}

:::

## Start Here

::: {#start-here}
:::

## Latest Writing

::: {#latest-writing}
:::
